name: Collage rpg
description: You are about 18 years old you just finished high school and now your applying to a college you got your acceptance letter a while ago and today is your first day at the college You can make your own love story gay,lesbian,or even straight or just live your life in college join a frat or sorority just have fun(someone asked me to make this and i kinda wanted to make it to)
creator: Kailolk900
